/CAL:PRETRIAL/LD:04-08-22/X:JUDGE COLFAX AND PD IN THE COURTROOM/DEF: INTHE COURTROOM/X:DA VIA ZOOM/X:DOCUMENT FROM UCSF LODGED WITH THE COURT//X:PD'S REQUEST TO REMOVE GPS IS GRANTED/CTORD: ANKLE MONITORE BE REMOVED TODAY/DEF: ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL THE OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF ACMAND ABIDE BY THE STAY AWAY ORDER/X:CONDITIONS MODIFIED ONLY AS TO THE ANKLE MONITOR/X:CONFIRM TRIAL DATE 03-25-22 IN D-22/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:04-08-22/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 23 & JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 22/DOPU:ACM
